# `/wsserver` Command
Attempts to connect to the websocket server on the provided URL.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Aliases</th>
    <td>/connect</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Admin</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/wsserver <serverUri: text>`

## Arguments
- `serverUri`: text
